name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.admin_audit_logs` has an RLS policy `System can insert audit logs` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.ai_missing_demands` has an RLS policy `Allow authenticated inserts` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for authenticated.

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.quiz_responses` has an RLS policy `Public can submit quiz responses` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.waiting_list` has an RLS policy `Anyone can join waiting list` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

name: public_bucket_allows_listing
title: Public Bucket Allows Listing
description: Detects public storage buckets with a broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects`, which allows clients to list all files in the bucket.
detail: Public bucket `avatars` has 1 broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects` (public_can_view_avatars), allowing clients to list all files. Public buckets don't need this for object URL access and it may expose more data than intended.

name: public_bucket_allows_listing
title: Public Bucket Allows Listing
description: Detects public storage buckets with a broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects`, which allows clients to list all files in the bucket.
detail: Public bucket `cvs` has 1 broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects` (public_can_view_cvs), allowing clients to list all files. Public buckets don't need this for object URL access and it may expose more data than intended.

name: public_bucket_allows_listing
title: Public Bucket Allows Listing
description: Detects public storage buckets with a broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects`, which allows clients to list all files in the bucket.
detail: Public bucket `public-assets` has 1 broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects` (Acesso Público aos Assets), allowing clients to list all files. Public buckets don't need this for object URL access and it may expose more data than intended.

name: auth_leaked_password_protection
title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
description: Leaked password protection is currently disabled.
detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.

name: vulnerable_postgres_version
title: Current Postgres version has security patches available
description: Upgrade your postgres database to apply important security patches
detail: We have detected that the current version of postgres, supabase-postgres-17.4.1.043, has outstanding security patches available. Upgrade your database to receive the latest security patches.
